# Sprint 6.1 Decision Engine Development

**Project:** Customer Churn Prediction and Retention System
**Sprint:** Sprint 6. Automation
**Objective:** Automate the retention strategy using a decision engine and human-in-the-loop design.

## Description
Develop a decision engine to determine eligibility for intervention, type of intervention, and timing and escalation path.

## Deliverable
Decision engine developed
